user_prompt:
- A — Too much noise. Inbox is flooded with CI completions, your own activity confirmations, push notifications. The few signals you care about (review requests,
  mentions, security alerts) get drowned.
  - B — Missing signal. You're worried that CI failures or security advisories slip past unnoticed because they look like every other GitHub email.
  - C — Inbox hygiene. You want a clean filing system so old GitHub threads aren't cluttering search, even though you don't currently miss anything.
 All three equally, I know you are going to push back. Noise is probably the biggest convern, I want to make sure I dont miss signals and I want to have better hygiene according to best practices
